xmldoc.short_description: Returns public method names for an object or class.

param_input_item.param_description: a class name as a string, including package-qualified names

description.p: methods returns a cell of strings with public method names.
For classdef classes, methods declared with private or protected access are hidden from this list. Static methods are listed and can be called with ClassName.method.
For classdef object arrays, methods returns the public methods of the array element class.

example_item.example_item_description: List public methods of a classdef object array.
